phrases.intent_en: Ask where the public restrooms are
phrases.text_local: Com licença, onde posso encontrar os banheiros públicos?
phrases.pronunciation: KOHM lee-SAYNG-suh, OHNG-dih PAW-soo ayng-koongt-RAHR OOSH bahn-NYAY-roosh POOB-lee-koosh?
phrases.cultural_note: Public restroom locations at outdoor parks can vary; staff at the maintenance booth can provide current information.

likely_response.local: Pergunte ao funcionário da câmara ou ao jardineiro municipal.
likely_response.pronunciation: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih OW foonng-seeoo-NAHR-yoo DUH KAHN-muh-ruh OHW OW zhuh-ruh-dee-NAY-roo moo-nee-see-PAHL.
likely_response.translation_en: Ask the city council worker or the municipal gardener.

responses.english: Ask the city council worker or the municipal gardener.
responses.phonetic: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih OW foonng-seeoo-NAHR-yoo DUH KAHN-muh-ruh OHW OW zhuh-ruh-dee-NAY-roo moo-nee-see-PAHL.
responses.french: Pergunte ao funcionário da câmara ou ao jardineiro municipal.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the central statue is
phrases.text_local: Onde está a estátua central do parque?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih ehs-TAH AH SHTAH-toouh sayngt-RAHL DOO PAH-ruh-kih?
phrases.cultural_note: The statue honors the 19th-century monarch and serves as a central meeting point.

likely_response.local: Localiza-se no centro exato do jardim.
likely_response.pronunciation: loo-kuh-LEE-zuh-SIH NOO SAYNGT-roo eh-ZAH-too DOO zhuh-ruh-DEEN.
likely_response.translation_en: It is located in the exact center of the garden.

responses.english: It is located in the exact center of the garden.
responses.phonetic: loo-kuh-LEE-zuh-SIH NOO SAYNGT-roo eh-ZAH-too DOO zhuh-ruh-DEEN.
responses.french: Localiza-se no centro exato do jardim.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the public restrooms are
phrases.cultural_note: Facilities are maintained by the city council and are free for all visitors.

likely_response.local: Pergunte a um funcionário do parque.
likely_response.pronunciation: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih AH OONNG foonng-seeoo-NAHR-yoo DOO PAH-ruh-kih.

responses.phonetic: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih AH OONNG foonng-seeoo-NAHR-yoo DOO PAH-ruh-kih.
responses.french: Pergunte a um funcionário do parque.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the Santa Cruz Convent view is
phrases.text_local: Onde fica a vista do Convento de Santa Cruz?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AH VEESH-tuh DOO koong-VAYNG-too DIH SAHNNG-tuh KROOSH?
phrases.cultural_note: This viewpoint offers a classic perspective of the historic convent and city.

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para a vista do Convento de Santa Cruz.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH VEESH-tuh DOO koong-VAYNG-too DIH SAHNNG-tuh KROOSH.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to the Santa Cruz Convent view.

responses.english: Follow the signs to the Santa Cruz Convent view.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH VEESH-tuh DOO koong-VAYNG-too DIH SAHNNG-tuh KROOSH.
responses.french: Siga as placas para a vista do Convento de Santa Cruz.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the shaded stone benches are
phrases.text_local: Onde estão os bancos de pedra à sombra?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih ihsh-TOWN OOSH BAHNNG-koosh DIH PEHD-ruh AH SOHMB-ruh?
phrases.cultural_note: These benches provide relief during summer afternoons and are frequently used by students.

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para os bancos de pedra.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh OOSH BAHNNG-koosh DIH PEHD-ruh.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to the stone benches.

responses.english: Follow the signs to the stone benches.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh OOSH BAHNNG-koosh DIH PEHD-ruh.
responses.french: Siga as placas para os bancos de pedra.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the central statue is
phrases.text_local: Onde fica a estátua de D. Pedro V?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AH SHTAH-toouh DIH DEH. PEHD-roo VEH?
phrases.cultural_note: The statue of D. Pedro V is a central landmark in the park, often used as a meeting point.

likely_response.translation_en: In the center of the park.

responses.english: In the center of the park.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the main bronze fountain is
phrases.text_local: Onde fica a fonte de bronze principal?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AH FOHNG-tih DIH BROHNG-zih preen-see-PAHL?
phrases.cultural_note: The fountain is a historic landmark and a popular spot for photos.

likely_response.local: Junto à estátua de D. Pedro V, ao
likely_response.pronunciation: ZHOONNG-too AH SHTAH-toouh DIH DEH. PEHD-roo VEH, OW
likely_response.translation_en: The main bronze fountain is near the central statue of D. Pedro V.

responses.english: The main bronze fountain is near the central statue of D. Pedro V.
responses.phonetic: ZHOONNG-too AH SHTAH-toouh DIH DEH. PEHD-roo VEH, OW
responses.french: Junto à estátua de D. Pedro V, ao

phrases.text_local: Como chego ao monumento central deste parque?
phrases.pronunciation: KOH-moo SHEH-goo OW moo-noo-MAYNG-too sayngt-RAHL DEHSH-tih PAH-ruh-kih?

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para a estátua central do parque. Também pode pedir ajuda a um funcionário da câmara ou a um segurança da universidade que esteja por perto.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH SHTAH-toouh sayngt-RAHL DOO PAH-ruh-kih. tahnm-BAYNG PAW-dih pih-DEER uh-ZHOO-duh AH OONNG foonng-seeoo-NAHR-yoo DUH KAHN-muh-ruh OHW AH OONNG seh-goo-RAHNNG-suh DUH oo-nee-veh-ruh-see-DAH-dih KIH SHTEH-zhuh POOR PEHR-too.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs for the central statue of the park. You may also ask for help from a city council worker or a university security guard nearby.

responses.english: Follow the signs for the central statue of the park. You may also ask for help from a city council worker or a university security guard nearby.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH SHTAH-toouh sayngt-RAHL DOO PAH-ruh-kih. tahnm-BAYNG PAW-dih pih-DEER uh-ZHOO-duh AH OONNG foonng-seeoo-NAHR-yoo DUH KAHN-muh-ruh OHW AH OONNG seh-goo-RAHNNG-suh DUH oo-nee-veh-ruh-see-DAH-dih KIH SHTEH-zhuh POOR PEHR-too.
responses.french: Siga as placas para a estátua central do parque. Também pode pedir ajuda a um funcionário da câmara ou a um segurança da universidade que esteja por perto.
